title: odontites viscosus subsp. alpestris
intro: Odontites viscosus subsp. alpestris is a subspecies of the Odontites viscosus plant, a type of flowering plant in the bartsia family that grows in mountainous regions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Odontites viscosus subsp. alpestris include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
